children.content:
Kunal Kumar Gupta
RGIPT, Jais, Amethi
kunal21kumargupta@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/kunal-kumar-gupta
Education
Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT) Jais, Amethi
B.Tech in Mathematics and Computing (CPI: 7.22/10) 2023 – 2027
Experience
Technical Executive Apr 2024 – Aug 2024
Thinqbator, RGIPT Jais, Amethi
• Organized and supported technical events, workshops, and hackathons
• Collaborated on club projects and assisted in development tasks
• Mentored junior members in programming basics and tools
Projects
PlacementCoach – AI-Powered Placement Guidance Platform | FastAPI, PostgreSQL, OpenAI, AWS S3, Vercel
• Built an AI-powered placement guidance platform using FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and OpenAI APIs
• Implemented async parallel AI processing, reducing response time by 50%
• Integrated resume analysis, placement prediction, and job recommendation features
• Deployed scalable full-stack system on Vercel, Render, Neon, and AWS S3
RESPOND – Disaster Response Coordination System | Convolve 4.0 Hackathon
• Built real-time disaster system using Qdrant for semantic incident deduplication and prioritization
• Implemented multimodal pipeline (CLIP, Whisper, MiniLM) for cross-modal search across text, audio, and images
• Developed FastAPI backend with hybrid search, time-decay prioritization, and live monitoring dashboard
DocuMind – AI-Powered SaaS Document Chatbot | Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Pinecone
• Architected multi-tenant SaaS for custom PDF-trained AI chatbots using Next.js and FastAPI
• Engineered RAG pipeline with OpenAI embeddings and Pinecone using sliding-window chunking
AirSight AI – Global PM2.5 Forecasting Platform | XGBoost, Python, Flask, Leaflet.js, Chart.js
• Trained 3 specialized XGBoost models on 298K+ data points across 3,554 global grid points (R2: 0.979)
• Built glassmorphism dashboard with Leaflet.js heatmaps, Chart.js time-series, and real-time city geocoding
• Developed Judge Evaluation Console for live accuracy verification (R2, RMSE, MAE) on unseen CSV uploads
Achievements
Hackathon Winner – HACK THE FUTURE: Innovating Intelligent Data Insights
IIT Gandhinagar 2025
Certifications
Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) – Coursera (DeepLearning.AI)
Mastering Data Structures & Algorithms using C and C++ – Udemy
FastAPI - The Complete Course 2026 (Beginner + Advanced) – Udemy
Machine Learning Specialization – Coursera (Stanford)
Data Science Workshop – IIT Bombay
Technical Skills
Programming: C, C++, Python, JavaScript; Data Structures & Algorithms
Data Science & ML: Neural Networks, CNNs, Backpropagation, EDA, feature engineering, supervised/unsupervised
learning, evaluation/optimization, deep learning, prompt engineering, SQL
Libraries/Frameworks: PyTorch, Pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly, FastAPI, Streamlit,
Flutter
Tools & Platforms: Jupyter, Google Colab, Git, GitHub, Render, Netlify
Web: HTML, CSS, JavaScript
